---
title: "About"
---

## About Me

<!-- Replace with your own bio -->
Hello! I'm **Jonathan Pearce**. I work in the areas of data analytics, machine learning, and statistics.
This website serves as a place to share my projects, blog posts, datasets, and resources.

## Contact

- **GitHub:** <https://github.com/Jonathan-Pearce>
- **LinkedIn:** <https://www.linkedin.com/in/jonathan-pearce>

## About This Site

This site is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) and hosted on [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com).
See the [README](https://github.com/Jonathan-Pearce/Jonathan-Pearce.github.io#readme) for build and deployment details.
